subject: A wolverine or badger-like creature with flames emanating from its face and shoulders, crouching aggressively in a forest
description: A stocky, low-slung predatory animal — wolverine or mustelid in shape — crouches on a forest floor, mouth open wide in a snarl exposing teeth. From its face and the area around its head and shoulders, bright orange-red fire or flame energy radiates outward. The creature's fur is thick and dark brown. The forest behind is hazy with light filtering through trees. The animal's posture and open mouth project pure aggression.
foreground: Wolverine snarling with flames around its head; crouched on forest floor
emotion: pure aggression — wide open mouth, body coiled to strike
